expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 为总体尺寸，[板材厚度] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah tebal bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah tebal bahan papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุกระดานด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุกระดานพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng cộng, [BoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên hông, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Pagsukat, [BoardThick] ay Kapal ng Materyal ng Itaas, Ibaba at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay Kapal ng Materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကဖီနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားတွေကိုတွက်ချက်ပေးတယ်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ကစုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] ကအပေါ်ပိုင်း၊ အောက်ပိုင်းနဲ့ ဘေးဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] ကနောက်ဘက်ဘုတ်အထူဖြစ်ပါတယ်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំបន្ទះសំរាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជា ការវាស់សរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាគ្រោងវាងខាងលើ ខាងក្រោម និងវាំងននវាត់ស្លា, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាគ្រោងវៅក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດຂອງຂອງຄູຂອງຕູ້ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ເປັນຂະໜາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ເປັນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຈະນະກອນແຜ່ນແລະຕາຫນ້າ, [BackBoardThick] ເປັນຄວາມໜາຂອງປືນທີ່ເປັນຂລັດ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は総計の寸法、[BoardThick]は上板、下板、側板の材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背板の材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드의 재료 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드의 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla de fondo. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] représente les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur des matériaux des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकारों की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, निचला और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, а [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
